message:
refactor: consolidate findRigBeadsDir into single exported function

Three packages (doltserver, cmd, doctor) each had their own copy of
findRigBeadsDir with divergent fallback logic. Export FindRigBeadsDir
from doltserver as the canonical implementation and replace the other
two with thin delegates. Fixes a bug in cmd/dolt.go where the fallback
returned rig-root/.beads without checking existence. Added test case
for the "neither directory exists" edge case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
